PROJECTS
Shop Chatbot with Gemini & MCP - GenAI Chat Application
GitHub: shop-chatbot-v2
Built a GenAI chatbot using Gemini, FastAPI, and MCP that supports document-based Q&A and
vector search across WhatsApp and Telegram.
Implemented document upload handling and vector search with ChromaDB to answer questions
based on uploaded files.
Added persistent memory using SQL/MySQL

Telegram/WhatsApp APIs
Inline Suggestion AI API - AI-Powered Contextual Text Completion
GitHub: inline-suggestion
Built a FastAPI-based inline text completion service using multiple LLMs through LiteLLM (Gemini
and OpenAI).
Implemented APIs that generate real-time, context-aware text suggestions based on cursor
position to improve text editing workflows.
Tech: FastAPI, Python, LiteLLM, Gemini API, OpenAI API.
Smart-Turn Fine-Tuning Pipeline - Conversational LLM Fine-Tuning
GitHub: smart-turn-finetuning-pipeline
Built a fine-tuning pipeline for LLMs to handle Hindi and Hinglish conversational inputs more
effectively.

ional LLM Fine-Tuning

GitHub: database-mcp
Built a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that enables AI models to interact with a MySQL
database through structured tools.
Implemented tools to list tables, describe database schema, and execute safe SQL queries for
retrieving data.
Tech: Python, MCP (Model Context Protocol), MySQL, SQLAlchemy
